sections.heading: New
items: Import entire folders to your Palmier project.
More agent's capabilities - undo edits, ripple delete, ripple insert.

sections.heading: Improved
items: Better image and video generation prompts.
Improved agent tools - more compact context, accurate clip operations.
Better transcription-based editing - more accurate and faster.

sections.heading: Fixed
items: Fixed crashes when tracks changed, captions picked a stale source, or animated opacity rendered during export.
Splitting an animated clip now keeps the motion and visual changes intact on both sides.
